{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Impact
If the resolver parameter is passed, but the user does not exist, all failcounters of tokens in that resolver will be increased.

### Patches
This, along with other issues, was fixed in eduMFA v2.9.1.

### Workarounds
Limiting access to `/validate/check` to client applications (i.e. Shibboleth/FreeRADIUS) using an authorization policy with `api_key_required` or using e.g. the reverse proxy.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T15:35:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-18T15:35:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/eduMFA/eduMFA/security/advisories/GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/eduMFA/eduMFA/security-advisories/GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/eduMFA/eduMFA", "summary": "eduMFA: Unauthenticated Failcounter Increment on Resolver Tokens via /validate/check", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T15:35:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-74r7-3mjm-jc5v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "edumfa"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: eduMFA: Unauthenticated Failcounter Increment on Resolver Tokens via /validate/check
